Author: ArchiTed
Name: Rotation Solver
Description:
Based on the pve combat information in one frame, find the best action.

The `information` is almost all the information available in one frame in combat, including the status of the all players in party, the status of the hostile targets, action cooling, the number of action stack, the MP and HP of characters, the location of characters, casting action of the hostile target, combo ID, combat duration, player level, etc. In this case, opener is also a kind of information that a lot of abilities are not cooling down.

Then, it will highlight the best action one the hot bar, or help you to click on it.

It is designed for general combat, not for savage or ultimate. So use it carefully.
Punchline: Based on the pve combat information in one frame, find the best action.
Changelog:
2.9.0 (2023-05-16)


Features

* Add DutyWiped method that resets all IsLastXYZ (e086fed)
* Added burst info to DTR bar. (9000450)
* Auto load rotations (5cc14f3)
* New Prevention option to prevent actions until duty ring disappears. (3d50368)
* Show plugin status in a window (9351df3)


Bug Fixes

* add a parameter called mustUse in the ActionCheck. (85cd1b9)
* add an maxping option. (06ab250)
* add player null check. (cf9d9d4)
* add test file. (ffc9250)
* Added check for empty dir (cd91989)
* Added indent/unindent to make Param->Action look cleaner. (ef29552)
* change the order of loading file. (5884bc3)
* change the order of rotations loading. (06356bf)
* changed the description of Poslock. (e5613f5)
* clean the StateString, show more info in `Status Window` (5817d58)
* Cleaned left-over logging, (7b62da0)
* finished method ResetAllLastActions. (bd9a3d7)
* fixed provoke check. (ceab36e)
* internal change. (6d6d35f)
* make all tank stance can end the special duration. (5e11739)
* make defense command must use. (b806420)
* Prevent bloating of LoadedCustomRotations whenever a change was detected. (af170cd)
* Prevent buildup of _handledAssemblies. Still needs more done. (aff9a63)
* Prevent nullref exception if Dalamud has lost player character. (39d3242)
* Removed warning spam in dalamud log (868bd3c)
